mapper.select: SELECT fp.*, u.username, fs.name as section_name FROM forum_post fp LEFT JOIN "user" u ON fp.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN forum_section fs ON fp.section_id = fs.id WHERE fp.section_id = #{sectionId} ORDER BY fp.is_top DESC, fp.is_essence DESC, fp.create_time DESC

SELECT fp.*, u.username, fs.name as section_name FROM forum_post fp LEFT JOIN "user" u ON fp.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN forum_section fs ON fp.section_id = fs.id WHERE fp.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY fp.create_time DESC
